name: lazy-nevis
description: LazyNevis — for lazy people who don't give upis. A lightweight, open-source focus tool for your desktop.

scripts.tauri:clean-local: rm -rf dist node_modules/.vite src-tauri/target "$HOME/Library/Application Support/br.dev.sims.lazynevis" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/br.dev.sims.lazynevis.app" "$HOME/Library/Caches/br.dev.sims.lazynevis" "$HOME/Library/Caches/br.dev.sims.lazynevis.app" "$HOME/Library/Preferences/br.dev.sims.lazynevis.plist" "$HOME/Library/Preferences/br.dev.sims.lazynevis.app.plist"
scripts.quality:repository: bun run check:version && bun run check:i18n && bun run check:hardcoded && bun run check:agents && bun run spec:validate && bun run test:installers
scripts.quality: bun run quality:repository && bun run test && bun run build && cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
